Nav.waGreeting: Hello, I am from the imbir.kz website

Home.metaTitle: Imbir Thai Spa gift certificates — Thai massage & SPA, online in 2 minutes
Home.title: Gift the art of Thai relaxation
Home.subtitle: An Imbir Thai Spa certificate — online in 2 minutes. Pick a program or an amount, design a beautiful e-card and send it instantly or on a chosen date.
Home.how1Text: A program from the catalog or a gift amount
Home.how2Text: Card design and your own message
Home.how4Text: Delivered by email or WhatsApp — instantly or on a chosen date
Home.nomSubtitle: Give the freedom of choice — the recipient picks their favorite program at any salon.
Home.faqQ1: How fast is the certificate delivered?
Home.faqA1: Instantly after payment — to the recipient's email or WhatsApp. Or on the date and time you choose.
Home.faqA2: Validity is 3 months from the purchase date. The expiry date is printed on the certificate itself.
Home.faqQ3: Can it be used in any city?
Home.faqA3: Yes — certificates are accepted at all Imbir salons listed on this website: Astana, Almaty, Karaganda, Pavlodar. The only exception is the Imbir Platinum salon — it operates separately and does not accept website certificates.
Home.faqQ4: What if the program costs more than the value?
Home.faqA4: The difference can be paid at the salon. If it costs less, the remainder stays on the certificate balance.
Home.faqA5: Yes — for 10+ certificates leave a request on the Corporate page and we will prepare an offer with branded cards.
Home.heroLead: Classic Thai massage, oil rituals and spa ceremonies by certified therapists from Thailand — for body and soul.
Home.aboutStatement: At Imbir salons, treatments are performed by Thai therapists holding diplomas from the best massage schools of Thailand — so every visit brings genuine pleasure and benefit.
Home.aboutNote: At your service: treatment rooms for traditional Thai massage, a hammam, separate men's and women's areas, personal lockers, showers and a lounge — from classic massage to spa ceremonies for two and for groups.
Home.giftLead: An e-certificate in 2 minutes — for a program or an amount. A beautiful PDF with a QR code reaches the recipient by WhatsApp or email instantly or on a chosen date.
Home.giftBenefit1: Valid 3 months at every salon in the network
Home.giftBenefit2: Delivery via WhatsApp and email — now or on a date
Home.giftNominals: Denominations 18,000 · 30,000 · 50,000 · 100,000 ₸ — or your own amount from 18,000 ₸
Home.salonsLead: Open a salon's address in 2GIS or message its WhatsApp — we'll reply and help you book.
Home.ctaFinalTitle: The warmth of Thailand — for yourself or as a gift

Success.title: Certificate paid!
Success.subtitle: We sent the certificate to the recipient and a copy to your email. Thank you for gifting care!

KaspiPay.scan: Scan the QR code in the Kaspi.kz app, or tap the button from your phone.
KaspiPay.error: Could not create the payment. Please refresh.

Consent.title: Consent to the terms
Consent.notice:
By purchasing an Imbir Thai Spa gift certificate, you enter into a public contract under the terms of the public offer. Placing and paying for an order constitutes full and unconditional acceptance of all terms of the documents listed below.

The public offer sets out the terms for providing SPA services and purchasing gift certificates, the payment procedure, and the rights and obligations of the parties.

The privacy and personal data processing policy describes what data we collect, for what purpose, how we store and protect it, and your rights as a data subject.

The rules for the purchase, use and refund of certificates establish the certificate's validity period, how it is used at the network's salons, and the terms and procedure for refunds.

Before continuing, please read the full texts of the documents via the links below and confirm your consent.
Consent.scrollHint: Scroll to the end of the text to continue ↓
Consent.checkbox: I confirm that I have read the terms of the public offer, the privacy and personal data processing policy, and the rules for the purchase, use and refund of certificates, fully accept them and give my consent to enter into the public contract.
